appliedUpdates.description: Updated Phase 2 testing setup - preview server on port 4173
Created flow validator guidance sections for all 6 Phase 2 surfaces

systemicIssues.rootCause: Lecture content not loading from course-map.json
systemicIssues.description: Lecture detail pages (/lecture/lecture-01, /lecture/2) render minimal UI without actual lecture body content. The data from course-map.json appears not to be loaded or rendered.

systemicIssues.rootCause: Routing bug - lecture cards navigate to wrong page
systemicIssues.description: Clicking lecture cards on course map navigates to /examples instead of lecture detail pages. Also causes page state instability.
Keyboard typing in search box triggers page navigation instead of filling input. Enter key does not select search results.
The lecture filter combobox on Example Explorer is visible but all click/select operations timeout. Custom UI component not properly exposed to Playwright.

summary: Phase 2 user testing completed with 28/43 assertions passing. Critical issues: (1) Lecture Reader pages don't render lecture content - only navigation UI loads; (2) Lecture card clicks navigate to wrong page (/examples); (3) Search keyboard navigation broken (Enter key doesn't select); (4) Lecture filter combobox not interactable. Responsive layout tests all passed. Example Explorer and Code Viewer mostly working with minor issues.
